non_blocking_findings.summary: Prototype remains local-only by user choice
non_blocking_findings.why_it_matters: The user explicitly asked to keep the repo local and not push upstream until the prototype proves itself.

non_blocking_findings.summary: Passing rerun used a synthetic system key event
non_blocking_findings.why_it_matters: Regression run 0003 proves the registered hotkey path on the real app surface, but it does not replace an optional future physical-keyboard spot check.

suggested_next_step: Treat the task as complete locally and only rerun a physical-keyboard spot check if the prototype is prepared for upstream promotion.
